name: HUGE UPDATE!! — TFP
description:
⠀⠀

Into the world of Transformers Prime.

⠀⠀

˗ˏˋ★‿︵‧ ˚ ₊⊹

⠀

Created 6/7/24: Jack, Miko, Raf, Optimus Prime, Arcee, Bulkhead, Bumblebee, Ratchet, Megatron, Starscream, Soundwave, Knockout, and Breakdown added.

Update 1.1, 2/7/25: Added Wheeljack and Ariachnid, minimized most character definitions to help with memory

Update 1.2, 3/24/25: BIG UPDATE!! Description edited to match profile theme, SHOCKWAVE + PREDAKING + MECH added, character definition shorten, added better dialogue, fixed up messed up bits.

GUYS THE UPDATE YALL HAVE BEEN ASKING FOR— or most of you. SHOCKWAVE, PREDAKING, AND MECH IS HERE!! I also fixed a LOT of things so the bot can remember things easier now (i hope). but i’ve been debating added cliffjumper, bc he’s dead… but if yall want him just comment a lot and beg and i’ll do it.

This bot is the more advanced version that I made on C.AI. If you search up “Transformers Prime Rp” on C.AI you’ll find it, I promise. I wanted people to have more creative freedom with the bot so I moved it onto a platform with not so many restrictions. With this bot you fan fight, interact, make a whole plot, make a whole fanfiction (I saw you in the comments), and perchance get freaky. With all the updates and tweaks this bot should… SHOULD… be up to date with most things. Please if something goes wrong or if anything sticks out the norm please give an honest review, go into depth, tell me everything. I want to improve on bot making, it’s genuinely fun to program these type of things.

!! NOTE !!

If you couldn’t guess from a little subtle foreshadowing, yes you could possibly get freaky with the bots. THE BOTS. I made it to where NSFW with the children are not allowed, or I did my best to prevent it. I have no clue why’d you’d want to get freaky with them anyway… freak. Btw, i WILL respond to reviews, i want details and to know everything— if you leave me unresponded then i can’t help improve my bot.

Also, this story bends around YOU. You start the story however you want. You can take a place of a cannon character or insert your OC. It can be human, cybertronian, fish, whatever. It’s your time to shine!!!

OPENING MESSAGE;

⠀

At the Autobot base everyone was working while Jack, Miko, and Rafael just arrived at the base.
